title: Interaction Resources, Typed Parts, Conversation State, and Retention · Spiral Review
summary: A delayed engineering review reconstructs interaction resources, typed parts, conversation state, and retention from stakeholder, revision, runtime, model, interaction, call, result, state, approval, evaluation, trace, failure, and recovery evidence. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for typed Gemini interaction and state ledger after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Model each interaction with stable local identity, provider interaction ID, parent, state mode, timestamps, model, configuration, and outcome.
Preserve text, function call, function result, image, file, refusal, safety, and model-output parts without lossy string flattening.
Use previous_interaction_id deliberately, distinguish server-side history from stateless replay, and preserve local audit evidence.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""build-ai-agent-python cumulative safe evaluated AI agent portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python interaction, tool, policy, state, memory,
evaluation, telemetry, and recovery models with original fixed in-memory fixtures only.
Provider APIs, Gemini models, native google-genai, google-adk, Pydantic, HTTP, credentials,
host files, code execution, browsers, databases, telemetry backends, load, cost, privacy review,
and production effects require controlled transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class AgentPolicy:
    stakeholder_task_id: str
    allowed_tool_names: tuple[str, ...]
    maximum_steps: int = 12
    maximum_tool_calls: int = 8
    approval_required_for_writes: bool = True


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class AgentEvidence:
    revision: str
    model_config_digest: str
    policy_digest: str
    evaluation_digest: str
    recovery_drill_id: str


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Safe evaluated Python AI agent portfolio ready"

stimulus.title: State Retention Choice case record
stimulus.caption: Three excerpts from a learner evidence packet; only one connects a claim to a reproducible check.

lines.label: assumption
lines.text: A review agent engineering team handles case 6194 during a keyboard and screen-reader interaction review. Build deterministic Python evidence to reconcile interaction resources, typed parts, previous identifiers, per-turn configuration, state choice, and retention evidence; model output and tool arguments remain untrusted until validated; then change model capability, API version, schema, or provider state and revalidate the adapter. Browser code uses pure bounded state machines and original fixed fixtures only. Real provider APIs, Gemini models, google-genai, google-adk, Pydantic native validation, HTTP, files, credentials, code execution, browsers, databases, telemetry backends, load, privacy review, and production effects require explicit controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Choose stateless, provider-stateful, or application-stateful operation from privacy, deletion, audit, latency, cost, and recovery requirements.

lines.label: risk
lines.text: Server-side state is always cheaper and safer than application-managed state.

lines.label: evidence
lines.text: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Choose stateless, provider-stateful, or application-stateful operation from privacy, deletion, audit, latency, cost, and recovery requirements. Artifact under review: typed Gemini interaction and state ledger.

options.text: For separate evidence from confidence, run one convenient fluent model response, omit stakeholder risk, revision, model and API identity, interaction and call correlation, tool schema and authority, state and resource budgets, approval, changed fixtures, injection, privacy, accessibility, evaluation, recovery, and controlled provider transfer, then accept plausible text as agent proof.
The record names the assumption, applies State Retention Choice, and reports a changed-case check tied to the stakeholder decision.
The record says the result looks right but supplies no quantity, trace, condition, or counterexample. That claim does not survive the separate evidence from confidence evidence boundary.

steps.title: Safe AI agents and Python Record what required effort · Review State Retention Choice
steps.instruction:
Write the review evidence note for State Retention Choice: explain the governing condition, one failure, and how this concrete case was verified — A review agent engineering team handles case 4875 during a clean package, canary, and recovery drill. Build deterministic Python evidence to reconcile interaction resources, typed parts, previous identifiers, per-turn configuration, state choice, and retention evidence; telemetry and memory must remain tenant-isolated, minimized, redacted, and attributable; then inject cancellation, retry, repeated-call, checkpoint, or replay failure and recover without duplicate effects. Browser code uses pure bounded state machines and original fixed fixtures only. Real provider APIs, Gemini models, google-genai, google-adk, Pydantic native validation, HTTP, files, credentials, code execution, browsers, databases, telemetry backends, load, privacy review, and production effects require explicit controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Choose stateless, provider-stateful, or application-stateful operation from privacy, deletion, audit, latency, cost, and recovery requirements.

Evidence target: Safe AI agents and Python Record what required effort · Review State Retention Choice.
steps.why: Retrieval and explanation expose gaps that recognition questions can hide. For Safe AI agents and Python Record what required effort · Review State Retention Choice, keep State Retention Choice connected to executable Python model, interaction, tool, policy, state, approval, evaluation, security, deployment, and recovery decision evidence.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Choose stateless, provider-stateful, or application-stateful operation from privacy, deletion, audit, latency, cost, and recovery requirements.
